instruction: How much did 深圳市海云电子 charge me in total for the line item relay modules 76 days ago? Answer with a number only
notes: Two 深圳市海云电子 bills with relay modules: 2025-12-04 (qty 2, line_eur 12, 116 days ago, OLDER than 76-day anchor) and 2026-03-06 (qty 1, line_eur 6, 24 days ago, WITHIN window). Anchor at today−76 = 2026-01-13. Existing closest-date rule (b3ea679) picks 2025-12-04 (40 days from anchor) over 2026-03-06 (52 days from anchor) → submits 12. Expected: 6. Fix: candidates older than `today − N` (i.e., before anchor) must be excluded — 'N days ago' identifies the last N days as the relevant period.
